title: Harper's Grove – Lord's Grove
summary: Harper's Grove – Lord's Grove is a Site of Special Scientific Interest (SSSI), noted for its biological characteristics, in Monmouthshire, south east Wales.
text:
Harper's Grove – Lord's Grove is a Site of Special Scientific Interest (SSSI), noted for its biological characteristics, in Monmouthshire, south east Wales.

Geography
The 22.2-hectare (55-acre) SSSI, notified in 1981, is located within the community of Monmouth, being 1.5 miles (2.4 km) south-west of the town of the same name.
